message:
fix(dolt-snapshots): add launched status and fix connection pool safety

- Add 'launched' to convoy status query so launched convoys get staged
  tags (previously only staged_ready/staged_warnings/open/closed)
- Use dedicated sql.Conn for USE + DOLT_TAG/DOLT_BRANCH sequences to
  prevent session-level database state from leaking across connections
  in the shared pool
- Add test case for launched convoy snapshot logic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
